name: guition-jc4880p4-bsp
description: Board support for the Guition JC4880P443C_I_W (ESP32-P4): ST7701S 480x800 MIPI-DSI panel (manual bring-up, no esp_lcd_st7701 vendor component) + GT911 I2C touch. Double-buffered framebuffer + PPA hardware-rotate present API.
keywords: esp32-p4, esp32p4, st7701, mipi-dsi, gt911, guition, jc4880p443, bsp, lcd, touch
